scenes.narration: You know smoking kills. You smoke anyway. You know fast food destroys your health. You eat it anyway. This contradiction doesn't bother you as much as it should.
scenes.image_prompt: A woman holding a cigarette in one hand and apple in the other, conflicted expression showing internal struggle, split lighting with one side bright one side dark, black and white photorealistic, psychological tension visible in her face

scenes.narration: Psychologist Leon Festinger discovered why. Your brain can't tolerate contradiction. So it rewrites reality to make you feel okay about your choices.
scenes.image_prompt: close-up of a person's face with subtle distortion, one side of face lit showing one expression, other side shadowed showing conflicting expression, black and white high contrast, photorealistic, cognitive discord visible

scenes.narration: You don't just ignore the evidence. You actively reframe it. Smoking is actually relaxing and that's worth the risk. One meal won't hurt. Everyone dies anyway.
scenes.image_prompt: A man's hands holding papers with facts written on them, papers being blown away like smoke by an invisible force, documents dissolving in swirling motion, dark background, black and white photorealistic dissolution effect

scenes.narration: This isn't weakness. It's a survival mechanism. Your mind prioritizes comfort over truth. You can't function in constant contradiction.
scenes.image_prompt: A person's body with cracks spreading across the skin like fracturing glass, light bleeding through the cracks from behind, dark moody background, black and white photorealistic, disturbing and powerful composition

scenes.narration: The disturbing part? You're not lying to yourself consciously. You genuinely believe your rationalization. Your brain edited the file without your permission.
scenes.image_prompt: close-up of a person's eyes reflecting a bright light, an unseen hand visible at the edge manipulating something, pupils dilated, warm desk lighting contrasted with cold shadows, black and white photorealistic, psychological invasion

scenes.narration: Festinger proved it with cults. Members told the world would end on a specific date. When it didn't, they didn't leave. They doubled down. The contradiction was too painful.
scenes.image_prompt: A crowd of people looking upward at a night sky, faces showing disappointment yet determination to stay, dark starless sky overhead, eerie anticipation frozen in time, black and white photorealistic, crowd emotion palpable

scenes.narration: You're doing it right now with something. The gap between who you are and who you want to be. Your brain has a story ready.
scenes.image_prompt: A man looking in a mirror, reflection showing a subtly different person with a different expression, unsettling distortion, looking away in discomfort, black and white moody lighting, photorealistic optical illusion, vertical frame

scenes.narration: The truth doesn't set you free. It threatens you. So your mind simply edits it out.
scenes.image_prompt: close-up of a person's mouth with a hand gently covering it, eyes visible showing awareness of suppressed truth, shadow of revelation fading in the background, black and white photorealistic, psychological tension and intimate horror
